name: @kimuson/pi-auto
readme:
# @kimuson/pi-auto

`@kimuson/pi-auto` is a pi package foundation for building automation-oriented extensions, skills, prompts, and themes for [`pi-coding-agent`](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi-coding-agent).

## Install

```sh
pi install npm:@kimuson/pi-auto
```

## Package layout

```text
package.json
  ├── extensions/    pi extension modules
  ├── skills/        task-specific skill instructions
  ├── prompts/       prompt templates
  ├── themes/        visual themes
  └── src/           shared TypeScript source
```

This repository is intentionally kept as a clean base for new pi-auto functionality.
